title: Braised Leek and Peppy Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful Chinese-inspired stir fry featuring leeks and peppercorns, served with a savory sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add 2 tsp of peppercorns and toast for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add sliced leeks and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add 2 tbsp of chopped Mediterranean herbs and stir to combine.
Pour in 2 cups of vegetable broth and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to medium-low and braise for 10-12 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
